mutual_pair_count: How many unordered node pairs have edges in both directions between the two nodes?
Count the unordered node pairs where both directed edges are present.
What is the number of node pairs connected mutually in both directions?
How many off-diagonal node pairs show a two-way directed connection?
Count the node pairs whose two mirrored cells both show directed edges.
directed_strong_component_count: How many strongly connected components does the directed graph have?
Count the strongly connected components in the directed graph.
What is the number of strongly connected components?
Determine how many strongly connected components are shown by the directed graph.
How many node groups are strongly connected components in this directed graph?
undirected_component_count: How many connected components does the undirected graph have?
Count the connected components in the undirected graph.
What is the number of connected components?
Determine how many connected components are shown by the undirected graph.
How many separate connected node groups are in this undirected graph?
weighted_matrix_mst_weight: What is the total weight of the minimum spanning tree?
Find the minimum spanning tree and give its total edge weight.
What is the sum of the edge weights in the minimum spanning tree?
Determine the total weight of the graph's minimum spanning tree.
Using the weighted adjacency matrix, what is the minimum spanning tree total weight?
bfs_kth_visit_label: Starting from node {source_label}, perform breadth-first search reading each neighbor row from left to right. Which node is visited at position {traversal_position}, counting the start as position 1?
Use breadth-first search from node {source_label}, reading neighbor entries left to right. Counting the source as position 1, what node label appears at visit position {traversal_position}?
Run BFS beginning at node {source_label} with neighbors read left to right. Counting the source as position 1, which node is at visit position {traversal_position}?
From source node {source_label}, follow breadth-first search in left-to-right neighbor order. Counting the source as position 1, what is the node label at visit position {traversal_position}?
Breadth-first search starts at node {source_label} and reads each neighbor row left to right. Counting that start node as position 1, which node is visited at position {traversal_position}?
dfs_kth_visit_label: Starting from node {source_label}, perform depth-first search reading each neighbor row from left to right. Which node is visited at position {traversal_position}, counting the start as position 1?
Use depth-first search from node {source_label}, reading neighbor entries left to right. Counting the source as position 1, what node label appears at visit position {traversal_position}?
Run DFS beginning at node {source_label} with neighbors read left to right. Counting the source as position 1, which node is at visit position {traversal_position}?
From source node {source_label}, follow depth-first search in left-to-right neighbor order. Counting the source as position 1, what is the node label at visit position {traversal_position}?
Depth-first search starts at node {source_label} and reads each neighbor row left to right. Counting that start node as position 1, which node is visited at position {traversal_position}?

Answer format: {answer_hint}.

Required answer format: {answer_hint}.

Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.

Answer format: {answer_hint}.

query:mutual_pair_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a list of segments. Each segment is [[x0, y0], [x1, y1]], where each endpoint is an [x, y] pixel point at the center of one mirrored matrix cell for one counted mutual node pair; use [] when the answer is zero
query:mutual_pair_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the number of counted unordered node pairs as an integer

query:directed_strong_component_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes in image pixel coordinates around the topmost row label in each strongly connected component
query:directed_strong_component_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the number of strongly connected components as an integer

query:undirected_component_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes in image pixel coordinates around the topmost row label in each connected component
query:undirected_component_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the number of connected components as an integer

query:weighted_matrix_mst_weight.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes in image pixel coordinates around the matrix cell for each minimum-spanning-tree edge whose row label is topmost among the two endpoint rows
query:weighted_matrix_mst_weight.answer_hint: set "answer" to the total weight of the minimum spanning tree as an integer

query:bfs_kth_visit_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an ordered JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes in image pixel coordinates around the row labels visited by breadth-first search from the source row through the answer row
query:bfs_kth_visit_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the node label at the requested visit position as a string

query:dfs_kth_visit_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an ordered JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes in image pixel coordinates around the row labels visited by depth-first search from the source row through the answer row
query:dfs_kth_visit_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the node label at the requested visit position as a string

object_description.description: Generated description of the rendered adjacency representation.

source_label.description: Source node label for the traversal query.

traversal_position.description: One-indexed traversal visit position to answer.
